---
title: "New Rurality Datasets + Website Remodeling"
author: "Ryan Zomorrodi"
date: "2026-03-23"
categories: [News]
---

We have added 4 new rurality dataset to the website: Rural-Urban Continuum Codes (RUCC), Urban Influence Codes (UIC), Urban-Rural Classification Scheme, and Federal Office of Rural Health Policy Rural Designation.

In addition, we have introduced categories to the website, which allow you to filter datasets by overarching topics. State-wide datasets were also removed.

Best, The CEHI Training Team
